name: marketingskills
description: A collection of marketing skills tailored for Claude Code and AI agents, covering conversion rate optimization (CRO), copywriting, SEO, analytics, and growth engineering.

inputs.name: marketing_goal
inputs.description: Description of the marketing objective to achieve.

inputs.name: content_data
inputs.description: Text or content requiring copywriting, SEO enhancement, or analysis.

inputs.name: analytics_data
inputs.description: Data representing user interaction, traffic, or campaign performance metrics.

inputs.name: growth_metrics
inputs.description: Data used to engineer or optimize growth strategies.

outputs.name: optimized_content
outputs.description: Content enhanced for SEO, engagement, or conversion.

outputs.name: performance_insights
outputs.description: Analytical results providing actionable insights on marketing performance.

outputs.name: growth_strategies
outputs.description: Recommended tactics or engineered approaches to drive user or revenue growth.

outputs.name: copywriting_output
outputs.description: Generated or improved marketing copy tailored for target audiences.

steps: Identify and define the marketing goals and target audience.
Analyze existing marketing content and analytics data.
Apply copywriting techniques to improve engagement and clarity.
Enhance content with SEO best practices for keyword density and structure.
Perform CRO evaluation and apply optimization techniques.
Generate performance insights from analytics data.
Develop growth strategies based on analyzed data and marketing objectives.
Iterate on content and strategies based on performance feedback.
use_cases: Improving website landing page conversion rates using AI-generated copy and SEO optimization.
Generating high-quality marketing copy for digital campaigns.
Analyzing web traffic and campaign data to extract actionable marketing insights.
Engineering growth strategies for startups or digital products using data-driven approaches.
Automating routine marketing tasks for AI-powered marketing assistants.
patterns: SEO keyword integration and content structuring
Growth engineering approaches using data analysis

prompt_templates.name: seo_copywriting
prompt_templates.template: Create SEO-optimized marketing copy for the following product description: {content_data}. Focus on keywords: {keywords}.

prompt_templates.name: cro_analysis
prompt_templates.template: Analyze the following webpage data for conversion rate optimization opportunities: {analytics_data}. Provide actionable recommendations.

prompt_templates.name: growth_strategy_generator
prompt_templates.template: Based on this growth metrics data: {growth_metrics}, suggest innovative growth engineering strategies.

prompt_templates.name: performance_insights_report
prompt_templates.template: Generate a summary report of marketing performance insights from this data: {analytics_data}.
